buy_side_bullets: Economic Statecraft doctrine — five principles: industrial leadership, fair trade, household prosperity, human capital, dollar dominance. [Bessent]

20% of $9.1B portfolio in index put options — explicit macro tail hedge against broad equity systemic drawdown. [Soros]
Long AI/tech leaders (Nvidia, TSMC, Amazon, Alphabet) but simultaneously hedging with index puts — uncertainty not conviction. [Soros]
